mike_mentions.author: Shane McGrath
mike_mentions.text: I think this is pretty good but to note some of the logos are fairly pixelated @Miguel Migneco Perhaps these are OK for now though ? @Mike Pett

mike_mentions.author: Jessica Dordevic
mike_mentions.text: Designs can be found here for the dimensions. @Ciara Carroll @Miguel Migneco @Mike Pett @Joshua Smith @Erica Schembri

mike_mentions.author: Jessica Dordevic
mike_mentions.text: @Mike Pett thanks for the feedback. Yes we did agree to only have the offers when they have a match only. That was an oversight from my part after changing the designs. Theyre now removed

mike_mentions.author: Jessica Dordevic
mike_mentions.text: Here are the Proposed designs with the changes. I put different options under each other in the same page @Mike Pett @Ciara Carroll Let me know what you think.

mike_mentions.author: Chloe Christie
mike_mentions.text: @Miguel Migneco @Mike Pett could we have the dev ready design with: Just the elements that will be ready to be implemented on site. Using the components that we have already on site.

mike_mentions.author: Miguel Migneco
mike_mentions.text: @Mike Pett @Ciara Carroll @Eoin McCarthy @Chloe Christie @Joshua Smith Here is the Design File & Prototype. There are 2 versions as requested. 1 has a single full width banner, and the other has a multi banner widget.

mike_mentions.author: Jessica Dordevic
mike_mentions.text: Hey @Mike @Mike Pett @Ciara Carroll You can find the designs proposed here. There are two options in the file.
